gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (59/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (59/ 4)
text: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ نَجِيحٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا بُدَّ لِلْغُلَامِ مِنْ غَيْبَةٍ قُلْتُ وَ لِمَ قَالَ يَخَافُ وَ أَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى بَطْنِهِ وَ هُوَ الْمُنْتَظَرُ وَ هُوَ الَّذِي يَشُكُّ النَّاسُ فِي وِلَادَتِهِ فَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَقُولُ حَمْلٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَقُولُ مَاتَ أَبُوهُ وَ لَمْ يُخَلِّفْ وَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَقُولُ وُلِدَ قَبْلَ مَوْتِ أَبِيهِ بِسَنَتَيْنِ

قَالَ زُرَارَةُ فَقُلْتُ وَ مَا تَأْمُرُنِي لَوْ أَدْرَكْتُ ذَلِكَ الزَّمَانَ قَالَ ادْعُ اللَّهَ بِهَذَا الدُّعَاءِ اللَّهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِي نَفْسَكَ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ لَمْ تُعَرِّفْنِي نَفْسَكَ لَمْ أَعْرِفْكَ اللَّهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِي نَبِيَّكَ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ لَمْ تُعَرِّفْنِي نَبِيَّكَ لَمْ أَعْرِفْهُ قَطُّ اللَّهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِي حُجَّتَكَ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ لَمْ تُعَرِّفْنِي حُجَّتَكَ ضَلَلْتُ عَنْ دِينِي
قَالَ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْهِلَالِ سَمِعْتُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ مُنْذُ سِتٍّ وَ خَمْسِينَ سَنَةً .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Ahmad, from Ahmad Bin Hilal who said, ‘Usman Bin Isa narrated to us, from Khalid Bin Najeeh, from Zurara Bin Ayn who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘An Occultation is inevitable for the boy’. I said, ‘And why (is that so)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> would fear’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured by his<sup>asws</sup> hand towards his<sup>asws</sup> belly, ‘and he<sup>asws</sup> is the awaited, and he<sup>asws</sup> is the one the people would doubt regarding his<sup>asws</sup> birth. So, from them would be one who would be saying, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> was borne’; and from them would be one who would be saying, ‘His<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> passed away and did not leave a replacement (Imam<sup>asws</sup>)’; and from them would be one who would be saying, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> was born two years before his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> passed away’’.

Zurara said, ‘So I said, ‘And what would you<sup>asws</sup> instruct me with if I were to come across that time period?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Supplicate to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with this supplication, ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Acquaint Yourself<sup>azwj</sup> to me, for if You<sup>azwj</sup> do not Acquaint Yourself<sup>saww</sup> to me, I will not (be able to) recognise You<sup>azwj</sup>. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Acquaint me with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>, for if You<sup>azwj</sup> do not Acquaint me with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>, I would not recognise Your<sup>azwj</sup> Divine Authority. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Acquaint me with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Divine Authority, for it You<sup>azwj</sup> do not Acquaint me with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Divine Authority, I would stray from my Religion’’.
Ahmad Bin Hilal (the narrator) said, ‘I heard this Hadeeth fifty six years ago’.
en.sarwar: 29. Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad has narrated from from Ahmad ibn Hilal who has said that ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa narrated to us from Khalid ibn Najih from Zurara ibn A‘yan that abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) has said the following. “It will be necessary for the young boy to diappear from the public sight.” I then asked, “Why it will be necessary?” He said, “Because he will have fear- he then pointed towards his midsection. He will be the one whose reappearance will be intensely expected. It will be he in whose being born people will have doubts. Certain people will say, “His mother has just conceived him.” Others will say, “His father died but left no surviving son.” Certain others will say, “He was born two years before the death of his father.” Zurara has said, “I said to him, ‘What do you command me if will attain that time?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Pray to Allah in the following words. “O Lord, make me know You for if you would not make me know You I will not know You. O Lord, make me know Your prophet, for if You would not make me know your Messenger I will never know him. O Lord, make me know the one who possesses Your authority over the creatures for if You will not make me know him I will stray away from my religion.” Ahmad ibn Hilal has said, “I had heard this hadith fifty six years ago.”
